incidents.title: Armed Robbery Downtown
incidents.description: Robbery reported at Main Street and 5th Avenue. Suspect fled in black sedan. Police presence limited.

incidents.title: Street Lighting Out
incidents.description: Multiple street lights out in residential area. Very dangerous to walk at night. No repairs scheduled.

incidents.title: Suspicious Activity
incidents.description: Two individuals on motorcycles circling the neighborhood watching pedestrians at bus stops.

zones.name: Downtown Manhattan
zones.description: High foot traffic commercial area. Frequent reports of theft and robbery.

zones.name: Downtown LA
zones.description: Urban core with isolated streets at night. High risk for robberies.

zones.name: Loop District
zones.description: Commercial and entertainment district. Caution in late hours due to selective theft.

zones.name: Union Station Area
zones.description: Transportation hub with dark passages. Caution when boarding public transit.

zones.name: University District
zones.description: Protected campus area with good lighting and frequent patrols. Generally safe during day.

zones.name: Central Park Area
zones.description: Safe area with good street lighting, security cameras and frequent patrols.
